allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add video generation and publishing feature

Implements complete video generation workflow for NewsItems with AI-powered
script generation, validation, and multi-platform publishing.

## Domain Layer
- Add VideoContent aggregate root with state machine \(Draft → VideoGenerated → AIValidated → Published/Rejected/Failed\)
- Add value objects: VideoScript \(20-160 words\), VideoDuration \(15-60 seconds\), PlatformPublishResult
- Add enums: VideoStatusEnum, PublishPlatformEnum
- Add domain events: VideoGenerationRequestedEvent, VideoValidatedEvent, VideoPublishedEvent

## Application Layer
- Add commands: GenerateVideoCommand, UpdateVideoUrlCommand, ValidateVideoCommand, MarkVideoRejectedCommand, MarkVideoPublishedCommand, AddPublishResultCommand, MarkVideoFailedCommand
- Add queries: GetVideoByNewsItemIdQuery, GetVideosByStatusQuery
- Add DTOs: VideoContentDto with PublishResultDto
- Add service interfaces: IVideoScriptGenerator, IVideoGenerator, IVideoValidationService, IVideoPublishingService, IVideoBlobStorage, IVideoContentRepository

## Infrastructure Layer
- Add VideoContentCosmosRepository with partition key /newsItemId
- Add VideoBlobStorageService for Azure Blob Storage integration
- Add AiVideoScriptGenerator using Claude AI for 30-60 second video scripts
- Add AiVideoValidationService using Claude AI for video quality validation
- Add VideoGeneratorService placeholder for external video API \(Synthesia/D-ID/HeyGen\)
- Add VideoPublishingService placeholder for social platforms \(Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube\)
- Add Azure.Storage.Blobs package dependency
- Update ConfigureServices to register all video services

## Functions Layer
- Add video generation orchestrator with 6-stage workflow:
  1. Generate script and create VideoContent aggregate
  2. Generate video file
  3. Upload to Azure Blob Storage
  4. AI validation
  5. Publish to platforms \(parallel fan-out\)
  6. Mark as published
- Add activity functions with retry policies and error handling
- Add HTTP triggers: POST /api/v1/video/generate/{newsItemId}, GET /api/v1/video/status/{instanceId}
- Add API endpoints: GET /api/v1/news/{newsItemId}/video, GET /api/v1/videos/status/{status}

## Documentation
- Add comprehensive implementation plan \(docs/VIDEO_GENERATION_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md\)
- Update CLAUDE.md with AI-focused content discovery and project guidelines

## Configuration Required
- Add Cosmos DB container: video-content with partition key /newsItemId
- Add appsettings.json: AzureBlobStorage:ConnectionString
- Integrate external video generation API \(future\)
- Integrate social platform APIs \(future\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
